title: MagicGames VI
description: The official modpack for MagicGames VI
body:
# History
MagicGames is a minecraft project of small german Youtubers.
The core aspect of this modpack is revolving around the Fable-Mod, which is in itself an adaptation of the original "Titan-Mod".
The last MagicGames took place in 2018 and was based on the Minecraft Version 1.8.
Six years later, after the newly developed Fable-Mod released, a new MagicGames Modpack in Minecraft 1.20.1 was put together.

# Summary
This mod now is combined with many additional features, such as Battle Towers (known from the Hexxit Modpack), Eldritch mobs, and many more.
Various Fixes and performance mods are included, to ensure stable gemplay for modern Minecraft-Versions.
